name: Zanbamon

signature_move.name: Uchikubi Gokumon
signature_move.description: Cuts through the opponent's armor withRyūzan-maru.

description: A Demon Man Digimon which has the appearance of a horse-riding warrior. It is a courageous warrior who reigns as the general of the Musyamon corps. Although it is a general, it voluntarily stands at the head of its own army, and prefers fighting styles which cut into the enemy. Its lower half is fused with its horse in order to move more easily about the battlefield, so that even during a pitched battle it is able to swing its sword without losing its balance. Its Special Move is using the gigantic zanbato " Ryūzan-maru " it holds in its right hand to unleash its " Uchikubi Gokumon ", which has the power to cut through the opponent's armor with its gigantic blade, regardless of whether they are defending themselves. Its " Jūmonji-giri " is an attack it unleashes using the youtou it holds in its left hand, which releases a shock wave, generated by the nimble swings of its slender blade, that can cut the opponent apart crosswise. Zanbamon was adopted from a winning Digimon entry in the " Bandai-Town FAX Service Digimon Illustration Contest " which belonged to Mr. Arata Hirayama from Chiba prefecture .
